h1: How to Generate Gerber and Drill Files in KiCad 7.0

headings.text: How to Generate Gerber and Drill Files in KiCad 7.0

sections.heading: How to Generate Gerber and Drill Files in KiCad 7.0
sections.text: Blog > How to Generate Gerber and Drill Files in KiCad 7.0 How to Generate Gerber and Drill Files in KiCad 7.0 by: Mia May 24,2023 24639 Views 0 Comments Posted in PCB Design Tutorial Tutorial PCB design Gerber Kicad Now you can place order directly by PCBWay Plugin for KiCad After completing the PCB design in KiCad, the final step is to generate Gerber and drill files, which will be sent to the PCB manufacturers for production. This article uses the demo project provided with the KiCad software. All steps have been tested in KiCad version 7.0.0, and there may be slight variations if using a different version of KiCad. Generate Gerber Tips: To avoid some potential manufacturing issues, it i...

sections.heading: Generate Gerber
sections.text: Now you can place order directly by PCBWay Plugin for KiCad After completing the PCB design in KiCad, the final step is to generate Gerber and drill files, which will be sent to the PCB manufacturers for production. This article uses the demo project provided with the KiCad software. All steps have been tested in KiCad version 7.0.0, and there may be slight variations if using a different version of KiCad. Generate Gerber Tips: To avoid some potential manufacturing issues, it is strongly recommended to perform a DRC (Design Rule Check) before exporting Gerber files. Open the PCB file with the extension .kicad_pcb, then click on "File" -> "Fabrication Outputs" -> "Gerbers (.gbr)..." as shown...

sections.heading: Generate Drill Files
sections.text: Now you can place order directly by PCBWay Plugin for KiCad After completing the PCB design in KiCad, the final step is to generate Gerber and drill files, which will be sent to the PCB manufacturers for production. This article uses the demo project provided with the KiCad software. All steps have been tested in KiCad version 7.0.0, and there may be slight variations if using a different version of KiCad. Generate Gerber Tips: To avoid some potential manufacturing issues, it is strongly recommended to perform a DRC (Design Rule Check) before exporting Gerber files. Open the PCB file with the extension .kicad_pcb, then click on "File" -> "Fabrication Outputs" -> "Gerbers (.gbr)..." as shown...
